title: Content Update 0.5.0 — Path of Exile 2: Return of the Ancients
summary: Content Update 0.5.0 — Path of Exile 2: Return of the Ancients Table of Contents The Runes of Aldur League Endgame Origins of Divinity, the Endgame Overhaul Masters of the Atlas Delirium Breach Ritual Fate of the Vaal Moving To Core Abyss Expedition Other Endgame Changes Campaign Replayability Player Changes New Content and Features Ascendancy Changes Passive Tree Changes Skill Changes Support Changes Unique Item Changes Item Changes Monster Changes Quest Changes User Interface Changes Microtransaction Changes Bug Fixes The Return of the Ancients expansion contains a new league, an overhaul to Path of Exile 2's Endgame, with six new Endgame storylines and 2 new Ascendancy classes as well as a huge amount of other content. For more information about this expansion, check out pathofexile2.com/ancients

title: 0.4.0k Patch Notes
summary: 0.4.0k Patch Notes Added support for the upcoming announcement and new Supporter Packs. Thank you for the support! Has any exile really been far even as decided to use even go want to do look more like? Last bumped on May 25, 2026, 10:11:58 AM

title: 0.4.0j Patch Notes
summary: 0.4.0j Patch Notes Asynchronous Trade Fixed a bug where the "This item's price differs from the one you initially travelled to this shop for" warning was not appearing in certain situations. Last bumped on May 2, 2026, 7:19:26 AM

title: 0.4.0i Patch Notes
summary: 0.4.0i Patch Notes Added support for upcoming race events. Fixed a bug where some bosses would fail to emerge if the players had a stolen Proximal Intangibility modifier. Fixed a bug where the "Increased Critical Hit chance if you've Shapeshifted into an animal form recently" stat would not function unless you also had another stat that tracked shapeshifting. Fixed a bug where the Wings of the Phoenix Level-Up Effect would play every time you stopped sprinting with Phoenix Dodge Roll Effect equipped. Last bumped on Apr 18, 2026, 4:45:36 PM

title: 0.4.0h Hotfix 1
summary: 0.4.0h Hotfix 1 Fixed a bug where Wolf Pack could permanently reserve Spirit until the skill gem was removed. Last bumped on Mar 23, 2026, 2:59:51 PM

title: 0.4.0h Patch Notes
summary: 0.4.0h Patch Notes Fixed a bug where the ring size of Controlled Metamorphosis could not be rerolled with a Divine Orb. Fixed a bug with the Wolf Pack and Cackling Companions skills with Last Gasp Support and Tecrod's Revenge Support. Fixed a bug where campaign Abyss quest events could not spawn if your character was too high level. Fixed a bug where you could not toggle the tracking feature on the Prison Waygate Map Device while using a controller. Fixed a bug where stash tabs would fail to load on consoles. Fixed a client crash that could occur when there were many ground item labels in one place. Fixed a client crash when viewing the member list of very large guilds. Fixed a common client crash on PS5. Last bumped on Mar 20, 2026, 10:19:06 AM

title: 0.4.0g Patch Notes
summary: 0.4.0g Patch Notes Server maintenance and account system updates. Fixed a bug where the Guild Hideout button could sometimes be missing. Fixed a client crash that could occur when entering the Titan Apex or The Dreadnought Hideouts. Has any exile really been far even as decided to use even go want to do look more like? Last bumped on Mar 15, 2026, 4:06:31 PM

title: 0.4.0f Hotfix 1
summary: 0.4.0f Hotfix 1 Fixed a bug in the second phase of Jamanra's boss fight where players and monsters were floating high above the ground. This is a client side fix. You will need to restart and update your game for the changes to take effect. Last bumped on Mar 9, 2026, 1:35:31 AM

title: 0.4.0f Patch Notes
summary: 0.4.0f Patch Notes Added support for the upcoming Path of Exile announcement and new Supporter Packs. Map Portals in towns and hideouts now display "(Complete)" on their label once the map has been completed. Fixed a bug where you could be permanently slowed for the remainder of an instance after performing certain actions while slowed. For example, this occurred if you stepped out of Chilled Ground while picking up an item. Fixed a client crash. Last bumped on Mar 4, 2026, 6:25:21 PM

title: 0.4.0e Hotfix 2
summary: 0.4.0e Hotfix 2 Fixed Amanamu's Void monster modifier dropping multiple additional Omens, instead of just 1. Has any exile really been far even as decided to use even go want to do look more like? Last bumped on Mar 4, 2026, 9:17:50 PM
